subtitle: You already have the ideas. The drive. The talent. We give you the voice to match — through 1-on-1 coaching with experts who turn what you already know into real confidence.
features_subtitle: You've tried apps. You've tried courses. Here's what actually works.
feature1_text: Every session is a live conversation with a coach who adapts to you — not a screen asking you to repeat words.
feature2_text: No vanity streaks. We track real moments — the interview you nailed, the meeting you led, the call you stopped dreading.
feature3_text: Your schedule changes. Your energy shifts. We adapt. Book, reschedule, and show up when you're ready.
feature4_text: Prepping for a big interview? Leading your first team meeting in English? Your curriculum is built from your reality, not a textbook.
how_title: Three steps to owning every room
how_subtitle: From first conversation to full confidence
how_step1_text: A 15-minute call to understand where you are, where you're headed, and what's been holding you back.
how_step2_text: We pair you with a coach who gets your industry, your goals, and exactly how to push you forward.
how_step3_text: Within weeks, you'll hear it yourself. So will everyone around you.
curr_subtitle: Not grammar rules — real capabilities you'll use tomorrow
curr1_desc: Stop translating in your head. Start thinking and speaking in English — naturally.
curr2_desc: Walk into any room, own the narrative, and leave people remembering what you said.
curr3_desc: Emails that sound sharp. Messages that get replies. Writing that matches your seniority.
curr4_desc: Walk into any interview — TOEFL, job, visa — knowing exactly how to land it.
coaches_subtitle: Every Speexify coach has done what you're trying to do — in English, under pressure, for real
coaches_note: We match you with the coach who gets your goals
coach1_bio: Former enterprise trainer. Turned hundreds of hesitant speakers into confident communicators.
coach2_bio: Ex-consultant. Helps you build narratives that win rooms and close deals.
coach3_bio: Led global teams. Teaches you to speak with clarity, influence, and executive presence.
cases_title: What happens when ambition meets the right coach
cases_subtitle: Real stories. Real people. Real breakthroughs.
case1_title: From avoiding calls to leading them
case1_text: A software engineer went from muting himself on calls to leading client meetings — in 8 weeks.
case2_text: A fresh graduate walked into their dream interview, spoke with clarity, and got the offer.
case3_text: A team lead transformed how they present — and their manager noticed within a month.
testi1_quote: I used to freeze in meetings. Now I'm the one starting conversations. Speexify didn't teach me English — they unleashed it.
testi2_quote: Two months with Speexify changed more than 10 years of studying ever did. I finally sound like myself in English.
testi3_quote: My coach didn't just fix my grammar — they fixed my confidence. Every session felt like a breakthrough.
faq1_q: How do you match me with a coach?
faq1_a: We look at your goals, industry, current level, and personality. Your coach isn't random — they're chosen to push you in the right direction.
faq2_a: Anytime. No questions asked. Your progress carries over — nothing is lost.
faq3_q: What if I'm a complete beginner?
faq3_a: Everyone starts somewhere. Your coach adapts to where you are — not where you 'should' be.
faq4_q: How much time does it take?
faq4_a: One to two sessions per week. That's it. Even that creates a shift you'll feel within weeks.
newsletter_sub: One email. One insight. Every week. No spam.
cta_title: The gap between you and fluency? One conversation.
cta_sub: Your ambition brought you here. Your voice will take you everywhere else.
bento_stat_text: Our learners reach milestones 2.7× faster. Measurable in just 4 sessions.
demo_body: No textbooks. No passive watching. Every session is live, personalised, and designed to make you speak with confidence — from session one.
